compounds.frequency: accidental single dose (intended protocol: 2 IU daily)

benefits.description: extra stamina during workout, faster completing workouts

protocol_notes: Pharmaceutical grade Pfizer HGH from pharmacy via Genotropin pen. Accidental overdose due to pen mechanical malfunction—injected 20 IU instead of intended 2 IU single dose. User has been on 2 IU daily for approximately 2 months. Intended long-term use at 2 IU daily. No significant adverse effects reported from overdose. User reports no noticeable hand tightness or water retention.
